Text.Page:
Oh, I was hoping someone would come along who could help me!

The blue cyclones we've spotted here and there seem to be the source of our problems. The most powerful one is in the Thaumaturge Chamber on the second floor.

Would you mind taking a look? I can't go up there because...umm...I just can't. I’m not scared or anything. That's definitely not it. I'm fairly certain that the cyclone is perfectly safe, and probably—certainly—won't kill you.

I hope.

Did anything happen when you walked into the cyclone?

Just as I thought. The cyclone was safe!

What a relief.
